name: soria-stack
description: Codex-native Soria workflow guidance plus the fast $B browse flow from Soria-Inc/soria-stack.

interface.shortDescription: Soria CLI workflow guidance and fast $B browser QA for Codex
interface.longDescription: Brings the Soria CLI workflow and the fast $B browse flow from Soria-Inc/soria-stack into Codex. Use it for Soria environments, pipeline work, dive iteration, verification, and fast browser QA without depending on slower Chrome-first flows.
defaultPrompt: Use Soria Stack to inspect this env and suggest the next CLI steps
Use browse to verify this dive and capture evidence quickly
Help me run the Soria CLI workflow without using Sumo MCP
